name: Condor Club 24/7 Indoor Golf Lounge
address: 109 Northtown Rd Unit E, Normal, IL 61761
about: Condor Club is an indoor golf simulator venue offering self-service play in a private, 1,500 sq ft space located in Bloomington/Normal, IL. The facility features professional-level Uneekor Eye X02 technology with 3 cameras for accurate shot tracking and can accommodate up to 6 guests per bay. It operates 24/7/365 with flexible booking options including hourly rentals and various monthly memberships designed for different usage levels. The venue includes additional entertainment options like darts, cornhole, and a lounge area, making it suitable for both serious practice and social gatherings.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Uneekor Eye X02 technology with 3 cameras tracking 25+ data points
24/7 availability with flexible booking up to 45 days in advance for members
Private bay space accommodating up to 6 guests with no additional guest fees
Multiple entertainment options including golf, darts, cornhole, and lounge area
Transparent pricing with no club rental fees or hidden surcharges

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB (Bring Your Own Food) allowed; venue provides complimentary water

simulator_hardware.notes: 3-camera system tracking 25+ data points per shot

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you need to bring your own golf clubs as club rentals are not available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverages) and BYOF (Bring Your Own Food) are allowed. The venue provides complimentary water.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18 holes typically take about 1-2 hours depending on pace of play and simulator settings.

faq.question: Is Condor Club kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is family-friendly and welcomes children. They can enjoy the golf simulator, darts, cornhole, and other activities.
